name: alphaXiv
description: Search and read arXiv papers, analyze PDFs, explore paper codebases, and manage your research library via the alphaXiv MCP server (OAuth 2.0).
note: Provides 11 tools: discover_papers, get_paper_content, answer_pdf_queries, read_files_from_github_repository, and library management (list/save/remove/move papers, create/rename/delete folders). Sign in with your alphaXiv account — no API keys needed.

setupSteps.text: Click Sign in — your browser opens the alphaXiv consent screen.
Approve the request. The token is stored encrypted — you won't need to sign in again unless you disconnect.
